project.name: Module 10: Popup UI — Auth Screens
project.description: Create the popup React app shell with screen-based state machine routing, SessionContext provider, background message hooks, and auth screens (Login, Setup). First React UI module. Establishes popup architecture that Modules 11-12 build on. Popup dimensions: 380px wide, 550px tall (CSS on body). Components use shadcn/ui primitives. Zero business logic in components — all data flows through lib/ via background messages. Wait-for-response pattern: UI disables action → sends message → awaits response → updates context. Target: App.tsx ≤150 lines, each screen ≤200 lines.

preserve_verbatim: Login flow: password input → decrypt → show bookmarks.
First-time setup: create password → confirm → ready.

falls_short.deficiency: Holy PB popup.js is 2,287 lines mixing auth, tree, import, settings — untestable monolith
falls_short.hush_requires: Separate: App.tsx (router), LoginScreen, SetupScreen, each ≤200 lines. Zero business logic.
SetPicker dropdown on login screen from manifest sets.

falls_short.deficiency: No BIP39 recovery phrase display during setup
falls_short.hush_requires: Setup: create password → confirm → display 12-word mnemonic → user confirms → done.
Tailwind class-based dark mode. System preference respected. Toggle in Module 12.
Login screen shows incognito badge/message from IncognitoMode.

build_from_scratch: entrypoints/popup/App.tsx — state machine router + SessionContext + TreeContext providers
hooks/useSession.ts — GET_STATE on mount, provides SessionContext value. Lives in hooks/ (project root), NOT lib/ — React hooks import useState/useEffect which violate lib/ purity.
hooks/useSendMessage.ts — typed wrapper around chrome.runtime.sendMessage using BackgroundMessage types. Lives in hooks/ (project root).
Screen state machine: TRANSITIONS record defining valid screen flows
components/screens/LoginScreen.tsx — password input, set picker, unlock button, incognito badge
components/screens/SetupScreen.tsx — create password, confirm, BIP39 display, confirm written down
components/ui/PasswordInput.tsx — shadcn Input with show/hide toggle
components/ui/SetPicker.tsx — shadcn Select for password set switching
SessionContext: { isUnlocked, activeSetId, incognitoMode, sets[], navigate, screen }
TreeContext: { tree: BookmarkTree | null, setTree } — shell, populated in Module 11
Popup CSS: 380px width, 550px max-height, overflow scroll

user_stories.title: App shell: state machine router, contexts, message hooks
user_stories.description: Create popup App.tsx with screen state machine, SessionContext, TreeContext (empty shell), and background message hooks. Hooks live in hooks/ at project root (NOT lib/ — React hooks have React imports which violate lib/ purity per CLAUDE.md).
steps: PREREQUISITE: Install missing shadcn components: npx shadcn@latest add select label badge. Verify button, input, dialog, alert already present.
RED: Test: 'App renders without crashing'
RED: Test: 'shows LoginScreen when session is locked'
RED: Test: 'shows SetupScreen when no sets have data' (first-time user)
RED: Test: 'shows TreeScreen stub when session is unlocked'
RED: Test: 'useSession sends GET_STATE on mount'
RED: Test: 'useSession provides session state via context'
RED: Test: 'useSendMessage wraps chrome.runtime.sendMessage with types'
RED: Test: 'screen transitions follow TRANSITIONS map — valid and invalid'

GREEN: Create hooks/useSession.ts (GET_STATE on mount, parse response, loading state for SW cold start). Create hooks/useSendMessage.ts (typed sendMessage wrapper returning Promise<BackgroundResponse>). Create App.tsx with state machine (Screen type, TRANSITIONS record, navigate function), SessionContext.Provider, TreeContext.Provider shell. Screen stubs. IMPORTANT: hooks live in hooks/ at project root, NOT in lib/hooks/. The hooks/ directory already exists (hooks/.gitkeep from Module 1).
REFACTOR: Extract TRANSITIONS to separate const for testability. Verify ErrorBoundary already wraps App in main.tsx (it does — do not duplicate).
acceptance_criteria: Screen type: 'login' | 'setup' | 'tree' | 'settings' | 'import'
TRANSITIONS: Record<Screen, Screen[]> enforcing valid flows
navigate(to: Screen) validates against TRANSITIONS, throws on invalid
SessionContext: { isUnlocked, activeSetId, incognitoMode, sets[], navigate, screen }
TreeContext: { tree: BookmarkTree | null, setTree } — shell only
useSession: sends GET_STATE on mount, handles SW cold start delay (loading spinner + retry), updates context
useSendMessage: typed wrapper returning Promise<BackgroundResponse>. Imports BackgroundMessage types from lib/background-types.ts
Hooks live in hooks/ at project root (NOT lib/hooks/) — React imports violate lib/ purity
App routes: locked → LoginScreen, first-time (no set data) → SetupScreen, unlocked → TreeScreen
Popup CSS: 380px width, 550px max-height
ErrorBoundary already wraps App in main.tsx — verified, not re-added
shadcn Select, Label, Badge components installed
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/entrypoints/popup/ tests/unit/hooks/ && npx tsc --noEmit && npx wxt build

user_stories.title: LoginScreen with password input, set picker, and unlock flow
user_stories.description: Full LoginScreen: password input with show/hide, set picker dropdown (shadcn Select — installed in AUTH-001), unlock button, error display, incognito badge. Sends UNLOCK to background. Wait-for-response: disable button → send → await → navigate on success / show error on failure.
steps: RED: Test: 'LoginScreen renders password input and unlock button'
RED: Test: 'SetPicker shows all available sets from context'
RED: Test: 'unlock sends UNLOCK message with password and selected setId'
RED: Test: 'unlock button disables during send, re-enables on failure'
RED: Test: 'successful unlock navigates to tree screen'
RED: Test: 'wrong password shows error message without clearing input'
RED: Test: 'PasswordInput toggles show/hide password'
RED: Test: 'incognito badge visible when incognitoMode is incognito_active'

GREEN: Create LoginScreen with PasswordInput (shadcn Input + eye toggle), SetPicker (shadcn Select populated from SessionContext.sets[]), unlock handler (disable → UNLOCK { password, setId } → await → navigate or error). Incognito badge (shadcn Badge) from SessionContext.incognitoMode. Enter-to-submit on password input.
REFACTOR: Extract unlock handler to named function for testability
acceptance_criteria: PasswordInput: shadcn Input + eye icon toggle (show/hide), Enter-to-submit
SetPicker: shadcn Select populated from SessionContext.sets[]
Unlock flow: disable button → send UNLOCK { password, setId } → await response → on success navigate('tree') + update session → on failure show error + re-enable
Error display: wrong password message shown inline, input NOT cleared (user can retry)
Incognito badge (shadcn Badge): visible when incognitoMode === 'incognito_active', guidance when 'incognito_not_allowed'
Zero business logic: no encrypt, no chrome.storage, no tree traversal
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/components/ && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: SetupScreen with password creation and BIP39 recovery phrase
user_stories.description: First-time user flow: create password → confirm password → generate + display 12-word mnemonic → user confirms written down → create set + recovery blob via background messages → navigate to tree.
steps: RED: Test: 'SetupScreen renders password creation form'
RED: Test: 'rejects mismatched password confirmation'
RED: Test: 'after password confirmed, generates and displays 12-word mnemonic'
RED: Test: 'MnemonicDisplay renders 12 words in grid with copy button'
RED: Test: 'confirm button sends CREATE_SET + creates recovery blob'
RED: Test: 'on success navigates to tree screen'

GREEN: Create SetupScreen (multi-step: password → confirm → mnemonic → done). Create MnemonicDisplay (12-word grid, numbered, copy-to-clipboard). Flow: generateMnemonic() (can call lib/ directly — pure function, no browser API) → display → on confirm: CREATE_SET message to background with name + password → deriveRecoveryPassword(mnemonic) → createRecoveryBlob(tree_json, mnemonic) → save recovery blob → UNLOCK → navigate to tree. NOTE: createRecoveryBlob(plaintext, phrase) takes the serialized tree as plaintext — at setup time this is an empty tree: JSON.stringify(createEmptyTree()).

REFACTOR: Decide recovery blob creation path — either (a) multi-message: CREATE_SET → get tree → createRecoveryBlob (lib/ call or new STORE_RECOVERY message), or (b) background handles it all in CREATE_SET handler. Prefer (b) for atomicity.
acceptance_criteria: Multi-step flow: password input → confirm → mnemonic display → confirm written → done
Password minimum length validation (8+ characters)
Mismatch detection before proceeding
MnemonicDisplay: 12 words in 3×4 or 4×3 grid, numbered, 'Copy to clipboard' button
Setup creates set + recovery blob + unlocks
Loading state during crypto operations
On completion: navigates to tree screen
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/components/ && npx tsc --noEmit

Verify all component files ≤ 300 lines, hooks ≤ 100 lines

ErrorBoundary already in place (verified, not re-added)
E2E auth flows pass
Zero business logic in components
All ≤ 300 lines
Zero regressions

Context menus, auto-lock via chrome.alarms, Sentry BrowserClient (verified from stub), incognito detection, chrome.storage.session for tree persistence — all functional.

what_exists.shadcn_ui: components/ui/ has 4 shadcn primitives: button, input, dialog, alert. Does NOT have: select, label, badge — install in AUTH-001.
what_exists.hooks_directory: hooks/ exists at project root (hooks/.gitkeep from Module 1). Empty — ready for useSession.ts, useSendMessage.ts.
what_exists.background_types: lib/background-types.ts (TYPES ONLY) exports: BackgroundMessage (16-type union), BackgroundResponse, SessionState, MessageType. ADD_BOOKMARK uses parentPath?: readonly number[].
what_exists.test_infrastructure: ~600+ unit tests, ~100+ E2E tests. happy-dom. @testing-library/react ^16.3.2 already installed. Coverage: 80% lib/, 60% UI.

what_does_not_exist.shared_components: No PasswordInput, SetPicker, MnemonicDisplay beyond installed shadcn primitives.
what_does_not_exist.hooks: hooks/ directory is empty (.gitkeep only). No useSession, useSendMessage.

tech_stack.ui: React 19 functional components, hooks only. No class components. No Redux/Zustand.
tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui. Dark mode via class-based toggle.
tech_stack.testing: Vitest + @testing-library/react (^16.3.2, already installed). Playwright for E2E.
forbidden_patterns: Hooks in lib/ (use hooks/ at project root)

architecture.communication: HYBRID: GET_STATE on popup mount loads full session. Mutations WAIT FOR RESPONSE — no optimistic rendering, no rollback. ~5-20ms latency.
architecture.contexts: SPLIT: SessionContext (auth, sets, navigation) + TreeContext (bookmark data). Isolated re-renders.
architecture.routing: State machine: Screen union + TRANSITIONS record. navigate() validates. No react-router. ~15 lines.
architecture.ui_feedback: Disable action → inline spinner → await → update on success / error on failure → re-enable.
architecture.hooks_location: hooks/ at project root. NOT lib/hooks/. React hooks import useState/useEffect — violates lib/ purity (zero React/DOM imports). The hooks/ directory bridges lib/ ↔ components/ per CLAUDE.md architecture.

read_first: CLAUDE.md (especially hooks/ location rule and lib/ purity)

inputs.what_it_provides: generateMnemonic (pure function, safe to call from UI)

outputs.description: Session state hook. In hooks/ at root.
Typed message sender. In hooks/ at root.

items.suggestion: Make `code` required on the failure branch of BackgroundResponse (currently optional `code?: string`)
items.rationale: useSendMessage consumes BackgroundResponse — tightening the type before UI code depends on it prevents optional-chaining sprawl in every consumer

items.suggestion: Add E2E test for invalid `type` value sent to background (tests VALID_TYPES guard in real browser)
items.rationale: AUTH-004 is the first E2E verification story for popup — natural place to add message validation edge case

items.suggestion: Add E2E test for UNLOCK with wrong password when stored encrypted data exists (INVALID_PASSWORD path)
items.rationale: Most security-relevant missing E2E path. AUTH-002/003 create the stored data prerequisite; AUTH-004 E2E sweep verifies it

not_applicable.suggestion: Normalize NOT_IMPLEMENTED `error` field to human-readable ('Not implemented')
not_applicable.reason: Resolves itself in Module 12 SETTINGS-001a when all 10 NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs are replaced with real handlers

known_risks.issue: Background not ready when popup mounts (SW cold start)
known_risks.action: useSession handles delayed GET_STATE. Loading spinner. Retry with short delay.

known_risks.issue: SetupScreen crypto operations may block UI
known_risks.action: Loading state during PBKDF2. CREATE_SET message routes through background.
Width in CSS, content-driven height with max-height + overflow.
Test dropdown positioning in narrow popup. Portal if needed.

metadata.session_protocol: One Claude Code session. Install shadcn Select/Label/Badge first. Verify ErrorBoundary in main.tsx. Test in wxt dev.
metadata.quality_gate: Popup loads. Login + Setup work. Hooks in hooks/ not lib/. Zero business logic in components. All ≤ 300 lines. Wait-for-response enforced.
metadata.human_review_required: Walk through wxt dev: first-time setup, login, wrong password, set switching, incognito badge. Verify hooks/ location.

execution_rules.execution_order: AUTH-001 → 002/003 → 004. IMPORTANT: Module 9 must be fully implemented before starting this module.
execution_rules.clarifying_questions: Encouraged. Key: shadcn component installation, recovery blob creation flow in setup, hooks/ path aliases.
